economic_notes: Nation operates numerous business enterprises including catering, construction, gas bars, motor hotel, restaurant, building supplies, internet services, power corporation, and bus lines. Investment in Wuskwatim Power Limited Partnership recorded at cost.
notes: Financial statements dated March 31, 2020 but auditor report signed July 21, 2021 - significant delay. Large and complex consolidation with 37+ entities including multiple limited partnerships, corporations, trusts, and operating businesses. Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (NCN Thompson Bus Lines LP, NCN Thompson Bus Ltd., NAC NCN LP, NAC NCN GP Ltd). Wuskwatim Power Limited Partnership accounted for at cost. Investment in partnership of $171.4M is Wuskwatim Power LP. Capital construction in progress of $27.5M not included in tangible capital assets. Deferred expenditures of $4.1M relate to interest charges on loans repayable from Wuskwatim profits. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $64,240,866 + FNIH $8,497,294 + Province of Manitoba $2,092,697 + Manitoba Hydro $1,881,933 + CMHC $805,165 + NRHA $793,721 + Economic Climate Change Canada $200,000 + First Peoples Development Inc. $888,708 + MNFEERC $101,517 + Grants $96,328 = $79,598,229 approximately. OSR includes business revenue, VLT, investment income, rent, tuition, other revenue, and Aski Apuchetuwin fees.
